element_introduction_order.element: Exotic weapons (flare gun, voodoo doll, flamethrower aerosol)
Nuisance enemies (bats, rats, eels, possessed hands)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Crowd-management mechanics; individually harmless but deadly en masse
Core threat type; intelligent use of cover
Campaign climaxes; culmination of learned skills

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple keys (up to six per level)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Temporary power fantasy; tactical advantage window

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones before boss encounters
typical_tension_triggers: Multiple simultaneous threats (enemy types + environmental hazards)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty with cyclical combat intensity; early levels establish mechanics with moderate threat spacing, mid-game introduces hazard complexity and demonic enemies, late-game intensifies with higher enemy density and more demanding spatial sequences. Difficulty criticized as steep by some reviewers, suggesting sharp late-game spikes.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Super secret areas hidden through environmental exploration and non-obvious wall/object interactions
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden areas discovered through player curiosity and unconventional navigation paths; rewards found in these secret zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to weapons, movement, and basic enemy types; nuisance enemies teach crowd-management without overwhelming threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variety increases, exotic weapons introduced; demonic enemies appear; jumping puzzles and hazard complexity rises; key-sequencing becomes more demanding (up to 6 keys per level)
difficulty_curve.late_game: High enemy density and variety, demonic forces prominent, complex multi-key sequences, precise platforming over hazardous terrain, culminates in boss battles
notable_spikes: Introduction of demonic creatures (significant jump from human-only Cabal encounters)
Multi-key levels requiring complex spatial navigation
Late-game hazard-heavy maps combining jumping puzzles with enemy encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels require discovery and sequencing of multiple keys (up to six per map) to unlock progression paths. Creates non-linear exploration within bounded spaces and rewards spatial memory.

Areas combine environmental hazards (lava, crushing blocks, explosives) with enemy encounters, forcing players to manage threats while navigating dangerous terrain. Rewards positioning awareness and tactical thinking.
Mid-to-late game sections feature precision platforming over chasms, spikes, or lava with minimal margin for error. Tests fine motor control within FPS perspective.
Lower-threat enemy types (bats, rats, eels, possessed hands) appear in large numbers to create crowd-management pressure without individual threat. Tests weapon-switching and area-control awareness.
Each episode culminates in a single boss battle against a unique demonic entity. Requires application of all learned mechanics and weapon familiarity in a high-stakes encounter.
